basic_details.job_title: DMHO Ananthapuramu Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Data Manager and Lab Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Medical and Health Office Ananthapuramu (DMHO Ananthapuramu)

age_limit.age_details: Max 40 years (relaxable for SC/ST/BC/EWS by 5 years, Ex-servicemen by 3 years, differently-abled by 10 years). Max 52 years with all relaxations.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC/EWS: 05 years Ex-servicemen: 03 years Differently abled persons: 10 years Maximum Age with all relaxations: 52 years

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation in Computer Science or BE in IT/Electronic for Data Manager; Lab Attendant training or Intermediate with Lab Assistant Vocational Course for Lab Assistant.
qualification.details: Data Manager: Post Graduation in Computer Science with minimum 01 year of experience, or BE in IT/Electronic. Minimum 01 year post-graduation experience. Lab Assistant: Lab Attendant training, or Intermediate with Lab Assistant Vocational Course.

salary_details.pay_scale: Data Manager: Rs. 36,225/- per month; Lab Assistant: Rs. 15,000/- per month.
salary_details.details: Data Manager: Rs. 36,225/- per month Lab Assistant: Rs. 15,000/- per month

selection_process: Aggregate of marks obtained in all the years in qualifying examination (75%) Weightage for experience (up to 10 marks) Weightage for contract/outsourcing/honorarium service (up to 15%) Weightage for contract employment based on working area Computer skill test for Data Manager post (10 Marks)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DMHO Ananthapuramu Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://ananthapuramu.ap.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DMHO Ananthapuramu Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download DMHO Ananthapuramu Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DMHO Ananthapuramu recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DMHO Ananthapuramu recruitment is 30-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Data Manager and Lab Assistant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies, with 1 post for Data Manager and 1 post for Lab Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Data Manager post?
faq.answer: For the Data Manager post, candidates need to have a Post Graduation in Computer Science with at least 1 year of experience, or a BE in IT/Electronic.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 40 years, with relaxations available for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Lab Assistant position?
faq.answer: The Lab Assistant position offers a monthly salary of Rs. 15,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. OC and BC candidates need to pay Rs. 400/-, while SC and ST candidates need to pay Rs. 200/-. Physically Challenged candidates are exempted.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes marks from the qualifying examination, weightage for experience, weightage for contract/outsourcing service, and a computer skill test for the Data Manager post.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the DMHO Ananthapuramu recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it, and submit it to the O/o. DM&HO, Ananthapuramu.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: These positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DMHO Ananthapuramu, which is https://ananthapuramu.ap.gov.in.
